source_of_truth: Use this file for active work selection; use docs/IMPLEMENTATION_STATUS.md for verification detail.

features.name: Harness baseline and real project records
features.description: Replace harness placeholders with Crossfire-specific docs, feature state, progress, and handoff records after the repo was flattened into the root directory.
features.evidence: ./init.sh passed on 2026-06-01 after extracting docs/SPEC.md and deleting historical process docs: 48 node tests passed and smoke returned SMOKE OK.

features.name: Review lane runtime
features.description: Cross-agent read-only review/adversarial/gate flow with non-self reviewer selection, context collection, secret-path redaction, schema normalization, and deterministic arbitration.
features.evidence: ./init.sh passed on 2026-06-01; tests cover non-zero reviewer exit handling, background JSON launch, in-repo state exclusion, and partial result_status.

features.name: Rescue/task lane runtime
features.description: Read-only or write-capable task delegation with executor adapters, intent classification, repo mutation safety checks, touched file reporting, and session hints.
features.evidence: ./init.sh passed on 2026-06-01; tests cover write-capable delegated tasks, read-only delegated tasks, and already-dirty touched_files accounting.

features.name: Background jobs and state
features.description: Background review jobs with workspace-scoped state, status/result/cancel commands, raw output files, heartbeat, and result rendering.
features.evidence: ./init.sh passed on 2026-06-01; tests cover --background --json, in-repo state exclusion, and partial result_status preservation.

features.name: Host integration assets
features.description: Portable skills and thin host shells for Codex, Cursor, and Claude Code, including Claude gate/task-delegation assets and Cursor command assets.
features.evidence: Assets exist under skills/ and hosts/; README now documents the agent-first UX: Codex skill usage, Claude/Cursor crossfire-* commands, CLI as runtime/debug layer, configuration, FAQ, Apache-2.0 license, and codex-plugin-cc acknowledgements. README.zh-Hans.md provides the Simplified Chinese version. Project naming is now Crossfire across package/bin/skills/commands/config/env/state. The user-facing bin/crossfire wrapper is covered by smoke verification, while internal JS re-entry remains on bin/crossfire.mjs by design. Cursor and Claude review/adversarial/rescue command assets now explicitly parse natural-language agent mentions into --reviewer/--executor instead of blindly passing $ARGUMENTS as focus/request text; tests/host-assets.test.mjs guards this. ./init.sh passed on 2026-06-02 17:30 with 51 tests and SMOKE OK.

features.name: Known review findings closure
features.description: Keep regression coverage for the prior white-box/black-box findings: reviewer non-zero exit classification, touched_files for pre-dirty files, background JSON output, repo-internal state dir handling, and partial job status.
features.evidence: ./init.sh passed on 2026-06-01; tests now cover all five findings from the previous review pass. Real-agent E2E still needs rerun after flattening.

features.name: Real-agent regression matrix
features.description: Keep a repeatable E2E matrix for Cursor review, Codex review, Claude review, background review, gate, and write-capable delegated tasks.
features.evidence: Manual real-agent matrix was last run on 2026-05-30 before flattening; rerun and document it against the flattened repo.
